title: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley Technical Reports - Michael Lustig A Novel Self-Supervised Deep Learning Method for MRI Reconstruction (EECS-2024-170) Frederic Wang Respiratory and Cardiac Motion Correction Using the Beat Pilot Tone (EECS-2023-169) Katie Lamar Deep Learning Applications in Computational MRI: A Thesis in Two Parts (EECS-2021-91) Sukrit Arora Integrating a Localized B0 Shim Array into a Solenoid Transmit-Receive Coil for Permanent Magnet Scanners (EECS-2021-87) Celine Veys and Rafael Calleja Local B0 Shim Array Integrated onto a Solenoid TRX Coil for Permanent Magnet Scanners (EECS-2021-84) Rafael Calleja and Celine Veys Node-Pore Coded Coincidence Correcting Microfluidic Channel Framework: Code Design and Sparse Deconvolution (EECS-2017-213) Michael Kellman Parallelism, Patterns, and Performance in Iterative MRI Reconstruction (EECS-2011-134) Mark Murphy
